textByHash.74b45b59e618e3205ad024ab8067fc962741a6e1: Oh wow you can understand me!
textByHash.da1c6c4d635ebd1fb4fa28c9ff7fa4384cab5871: Well my uncle Daga's shop has been a bit slow recently, and we just got some new stock in so I decided to help and advertise a bit.
textByHash.df6bdb4860f0f2930773c0799d91f260a95c9f21: Oh just more scimitars, we got a few of there weird red ones too... dra-something...
textByHash.46a2499f7e1d6ba329a7d51b79057a75b933574f: Yeah that's the one, are they valuable?
textByHash.fed51b1bcda6ec85d9503c75909fb17629489bd5: Oh you bought one of those dra-whatever things, I was told they're not much good.
textByHash.7ca8885d385ac0555b8845016201f7564f2dbc8a: Well I'll be a monkey's nephew, I'm such a noob!
